allow: Bash(python3 -c 'import json,sys; items = [i for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if not i.get\('\\''resolved'\\''\) and i.get\('\\''type'\\''\) == '\\''bug'\\'']; [print\(i['\\''id'\\''][:8], repr\(i['\\''text'\\''][:100]\)\) for i in items]; print\(f'\\''\\nTotal bugs: {len\(items\)}'\\''\)')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[0], indent=2\) if data else 'empty'\)")
Bash(python3 -c 'import json,sys; [print\(json.dumps\(i,indent=2\)\) for i in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if i['\\''id'\\''].startswith\('\\''81801cdee52243168d88c87ab91b492e'\\''\)]')
